summary: Small build-system fix for lbtime.c scheduling: the Makefile now assigns MWCC_EPI_VERSION := 1.2.5 specifically for $(EPILOGUE_DIR)/src/lb/lbtime.o. The PR body states this will fix lbtime.c scheduling; no review discussion was present.
what_changed: Added a per-object Makefile rule for $(EPILOGUE_DIR)/src/lb/lbtime.o.
Set MWCC_EPI_VERSION := 1.2.5 only for the lbtime.o build target.
No C source or header files were changed.
smart_moves: Scoped the compiler version change narrowly to lbtime.o instead of changing the global MWCC_EPI_VERSION or CFLAGS.
Used Makefile target-specific variable assignment, preserving the existing global CFLAGS and host build flags.
decomp_lessons: When a single translation unit schedules differently, a target-specific compiler version override can be the minimal matching fix.
For MWCC/Epilogue builds, compiler version can affect instruction scheduling enough to matter for matching.
Prefer localized Makefile overrides for isolated object-file matching issues to avoid disturbing unrelated matched objects.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use target-specific MWCC_EPI_VERSION assignment for one object file when lbtime.c or similar files require a different Metrowerks compiler behavior.
The specific version selected here was MWCC_EPI_VERSION 1.2.5 for $(EPILOGUE_DIR)/src/lb/lbtime.o.
follow_up_queries: Find other PRs that add target-specific MWCC_EPI_VERSION overrides.
Search for lbtime.c matching or scheduling fixes after PR 164.
Search Makefile for object-specific compiler version assignments.
